title: docs/dashboards: example Lovelace YAML (apexcharts-card bar/heatmap/sankey)
acceptance_criteria: Example Lovelace YAML uses apexcharts-card for bar chart of annual savings comparison across scenarios
Example includes heatmap visualization for battery charge/discharge patterns
Example includes sankey-style visualization for energy flow
README note clarifies apexcharts-card is a soft dependency (frontend HACS card), not a Python requirement
YAML is valid and documented with setup instructions
